reviews.review_description: Add please gun pitch ,gun Yaw settings how to use the Ace gun ,k3d gun and 5 star Will be
My aim sucks in VR,  (i had to finish some other games like boneworks using mostly melee), but since I started playing, my aim is getting better while i have a lot of fun.
If you like minigames and compete with other people this is perfect for you. The minigames are well balanced and they are really inmersive. Fun for all ages!!!
Once you start playing you won't stop! Very addictive and entertaining 🤩 10/10!

reviews.review_title: Wow. Great arcade game for VR!
reviews.review_description:
I thought I was a great shoot. This game proved me that I can do better. 
The arcade feeling is awesome. Great job. Can't wait to see all the minigames.

I love it! Visually is very friendly and colorful, and there are many many minigames with different mechanics 👏🏼👏🏼
My girlfriend and I are battling each other to get the highest score lmao hahahaha
It is really fun to play with friends to get the max score, furthermore, world leaderboard even regional is interesting to see, I could swear I know some of the top ranking players nickname.

I really love this game! It reminds me of Point Blank from the ps1. Must buy!
I would love to see this game succeed with all of the 50 minigames.
This game deserves so much more attention, for me it’s a golden vr game.


(Ps, when comes the extra minigames?)

developer_response.body: Hey man! We are looking for a way to release new minigames. The game did not work as good as we thought and it's been challenging to keep making content. Hopefully we will have good news soon! Thanks for buying the game!
